subcodes.first_line: O close companion of ‘Abdu’l-Baha! O dear fellow traveler of ‘Abdu’l-Baha! Praised be God, this second journey, too, has come to an end
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای قرین و ندیم عبدالبهاء ای همسفر نازنین عبدالبهاء الحمد لله این سفر ثانی نیز
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
